method: static use/write path and race proof
evidence: mission_allows reads a snapshot; controller never increments; admission does not reserve status ownership; two N-1 checks both allow.
proof_gap: No non-test controller::mission_allows caller; toolproxy uses a separate Mission implementation.

source: concurrent mission calls or tenant-reset status
closest_control: pure snapshot check detached from atomic reservation
sink: Allow result gates privileged tool action
severity_facts: invariant broken but current deployed consumer absent
